text:
Once upon a time in a small, sunny village, there lived a young girl named Lily who had a special love for flowers. Every morning, she would walk through the fields, picking the most beautiful blooms to arrange in her garden.

One day, as she was wandering through the fields, she stumbled upon a tiny, injured butterfly lying on the ground. Its wings were torn, and it seemed weak from its struggle. Without hesitation, Lily gently picked up the butterfly and took it home.

She carefully nursed the butterfly back to health, feeding it nectar from her garden and gently cleaning its wings. Days passed, and the butterfly grew stronger. Finally, one bright morning, Lily watched in awe as the butterfly spread its wings and took flight.

Overjoyed, she released the butterfly into the sky, watching it soar above the treetops until it was nothing but a speck in the distance. That night, as Lily lay in bed, she felt a gentle breeze blowing through her window
